title: Social Media Extremism Detection
description: Deep learning solution using fine-tuned HuggingFace Transformers for detecting extremist content on social media. Achieved 94% accuracy with fine-tuned model.
details: Conducted comparative analysis with classical ML models (Logistic Regression, SVC, MLPClassifier, XGBoost). Fine-tuned transformer models achieved the highest accuracy.

title: Diabetes Prediction
description: 2-layer Feed Forward Neural Network built with PyTorch Lightning for large-scale tabular binary classification with Optuna hyperparameter optimization.
details: Implemented robust preprocessing pipeline with custom OutlierClipper and ColumnTransformer. Optimized hyperparameters using Optuna for learning rate, hidden dimensions, and dropout.

title: Loan Payback Prediction
description: Binary classifier for 590k+ financial records, achieving 0.922 ROC AUC in Kaggle competition with automated XGBoost optimization.
details: Built automated preprocessing pipelines using ColumnTransformer and optimized XGBoost hyperparameters to handle significant class imbalance. Managed end-to-end workflow with automated Kaggle submissions.

title: Vehicle Parking Management System
description: Multi-user web application built with Flask for managing parking lots, spots, and vehicle reservations with dynamic capacity adjustments.
details: Engineered robust SQLAlchemy logic for dynamic capacity adjustments and cascading deletes. Implemented Jinja2 filters for accurate billing calculations.
